register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Get your business started on Bukano
register.agreeToTermsPrefix: By creating an account, you agree to our

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your business

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new one.
forgotPassword.sent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.missingToken: This link is missing or invalid. Request a new one.

errors.locked: Too many failed attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

type.title: What kind of business do you run?
type.subtitle: This sets your starting services and the look of your page.

services.title: Your services
services.subtitle: Edit the pre-filled services or add your own.
services.name: Name

hours.title: Working hours
hours.subtitle: When are you available for appointments?

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Pick an accent colour and a short tagline for your page.
branding.uploadsNote: You can add a logo and cover photo later from the dashboard.

mode.title: Booking mode
mode.subtitle: How should appointments be confirmed?
mode.approvedClientsDescription: New clients wait for approval once, then book instantly.
mode.requireVerificationHint: Clients verify a one-time code sent to their email before booking.
mode.collectPhone: Also ask for a phone number
mode.collectPhoneHint: Stored for your reference only -- never used to send anything.

billing.title: Choose your plan
billing.subtitle: Pick a plan to start taking real bookings — every plan requires payment, there's no free tier.

live.title: You're live!
live.subtitle: Your booking page is available at:

public.notFound: There's no business at this address.

nav.pricingPickStaff: Pick a staff member below to see their prices.

manage.title: Your booking
manage.notFound: This link is invalid or has expired.

service.title: Choose a service
service.empty: This business hasn't added any services yet.

datetime.title: Pick a day and time
datetime.noSlots: No available slots on this day.

errors.code_expired: That code expired. Send a new one.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many wrong attempts. Send a new code.
errors.no_pending_code: No active code. Send a new one.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Wait a bit and try again.
errors.daily_cap_reached: Daily limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
errors.captcha_failed: The verification check failed. Try again.

result.pendingBody: The owner needs to approve your booking. You'll be contacted soon.

errors.locked: Too many wrong attempts. Try again later.

hours.title: Working hours
hours.subtitle: Hours and slot length for the default staff member.
hours.vacationHint: Date ranges added here are blocked from public booking, on top of the weekly hours above.
hours.vacationError: Couldn't add that range -- check the dates and try again.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.subtitle: All appointments for your business.
agenda.flaggedHint: This phone, IP, or your business hit today's booking volume cap, so this was held for review instead of auto-confirming.

staff.title: Staff
staff.subtitle: Add and manage who works here.
staff.switcherHint: Use the "Viewing as" switcher in the sidebar to act as a specific staff member and manage their own services, hours, and appointments. They can set their own optional PIN from Settings once you've switched to them.
staff.bioPlaceholder: Short bio or specialties shown on your public page (optional)

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Clients who've booked or been added manually.
clients.name: Name

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.subtitle: Vouchers you grant to clients, honored in person -- nothing here charges anyone.
marketing.notEnabled: Marketing tools are off. Turn them on from Settings to use vouchers.
marketing.loyaltyActive: Loyalty is on: clients get a free-booking voucher every {{n}} bookings.
marketing.grantHint: Shown on the client's next booking confirmation email; you honor it in person.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Your page's logo, cover photo, accent colour, and tagline.
branding.galleryHint: Shown on your booking page when you add at least one photo.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Core details and booking behaviour.
settings.publicPageHint: Shown on your booking page when filled in -- leave blank to hide a section.
settings.marketingHint: Off by default. Turn on to send clients vouchers -- manually, or automatically via a loyalty reward. The owner honors any voucher in person; nothing here charges a client.
settings.myPinHint: Optional -- ask for this PIN next time someone switches into this staff member's view on a shared device.
settings.myPinSwitchHint: Switch to a specific staff member above to set their PIN.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Your current plan and subscription status.

promoErrors.already_redeemed: That code has already been used.

planErrors.plan_staff_limit_reached: Your plan's staff limit has been reached.
planErrors.plan_branding_not_allowed: Branding isn't included in your current plan.
planErrors.plan_too_small_for_existing_staff: That plan doesn't allow enough staff for everyone you already have.
planErrors.plan_stats_not_allowed: Stats aren't included in your current plan.
planErrors.plan_marketing_tools_not_allowed: Marketing tools aren't included in your current plan.
planErrors.subscription_required: This business needs an active subscription to take bookings.
